creator: oleglelchuk@gmail.com
text: This problem has existed for many months already. While I am on the console (x11 or wayland are not loaded), 8 BSD logos sometimes appear in the left corner of my screen. The problem can be seen in the attachment provided. I use drm-devel-kmod/i915kms. I am running FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r364115, but as I said, this problem has existed for many months already.
